behaviors.description: Missing required key across both config file and `TOOL_` env overrides reports exact dotted path (e.g., `database.host`).
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at handoff between file load, env overlay, and required-key validation/message formatting, not a single pure function. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network/external API needed. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected higher levels because behavior text only concerns startup config resolution/error text, with no real HTTP/subprocess/model pipeline.
behaviors.test_description: Use a temp config file missing `database.host`, clear matching `TOOL_DATABASE_HOST`, run loader startup path, assert raised error contains exact `database.host`. Keep real YAML parsing and env mapping in-process.

behaviors.description: When `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is set, config path resolves under it instead of `~/.config`.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: this is module wiring (env read -> path resolver -> loader open target path). Unit-only path helper test can miss startup wiring defects. REAL-INFRA: no real network/subprocess required; local filesystem is sufficient. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected System since behavior text is simple path selection, not OS event semantics/subprocess behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Create temp directory, set `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` to it, place config at `<xdg>/tool/config.yaml`, run loader entrypoint, assert it reads that file and not `~/.config/tool/config.yaml`.

behaviors.description: `TOOL_` environment variable overrides conflicting key from YAML config.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: precedence bugs appear where env-normalization and YAML-loaded dict merge interact. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network needed. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected higher levels because behavior text is deterministic config precedence, not OS/process or model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Write config with `database.host: filehost`, set `TOOL_DATABASE_HOST=envhost`, run loader startup, assert effective value is `envhost`.

behaviors.description: YAML syntax error surfaces actionable message including parser-detected line number.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: message correctness depends on real parser exception metadata flowing through loader error handling; mocking parser can hide mismatch. REAL-INFRA: still in-process/local file only, no subprocess/network. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected System because behavior text is parser error propagation, not external process/OS primitive behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Create malformed YAML file with known bad line, invoke loader startup, assert failure message contains that line number from parser exception.

behaviors.description: If config directory is missing at startup, loader creates directory and writes defaults file before continuing.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug is in interaction between startup flow, path resolution, directory creation, and default serialization; pure unit mocks can miss ordering/state issues. REAL-INFRA: requires local filesystem operations, but not subprocess/network; this fits Integration per local filesystem boundary. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real OS event watchers, process semantics, or external services.
behaviors.test_description: Point config root to empty temp location with no `tool/` dir, run loader startup, assert directory now exists, defaults file exists with expected baseline keys, and loader proceeds without fatal error.
